footer.tagline: Free tools for developers and everyday users. Built with ❤️ by AlwizBA.

hero.subtitle: Free tools for developers and everyday users. Base64, Hash, Open Graph, QR Code, and more — use right away, no sign-up needed.

base64.name: Base64 Encode/Decode
base64.desc: Encode or decode text & files to Base64 format
base64.title: Base64 Encode / Decode
base64.subtitle: Encode or decode text to Base64. Supports plain text and URL-safe Base64.
base64.aboutText: Base64 is an encoding that converts binary data into ASCII text using 64 characters. Often used to transmit data through text-only media, like email or JSON payloads. URL-safe Base64 replaces + and / with - and _.

hash.name: Hash Generator
hash.desc: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 hash from text
hash.title: Hash Generator
hash.subtitle: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 hashes from any text.
hash.aboutText: Hash functions convert input into a fixed-size output that is one-way (irreversible). MD5 and SHA-1 are considered insecure for cryptography but are still used for checksums. Use SHA-256 or higher for security.

opengraph.name: Open Graph Checker
opengraph.desc: Check and preview OG meta & Twitter Card from any URL
opengraph.title: Open Graph Checker
opengraph.subtitle: Check and preview Open Graph meta tags and Twitter Card from any URL.
opengraph.urlHint: Make sure the URL includes https://

urlCodec.name: URL Encoder/Decoder
urlCodec.desc: Encode and decode URL or URL components
urlCodec.title: URL Encoder / Decoder
urlCodec.subtitle: Quickly encode or decode URLs and URL components.

jsonFormatter.name: JSON Formatter
jsonFormatter.desc: Format, validate, and minify JSON easily
jsonFormatter.title: JSON Formatter & Validator
jsonFormatter.subtitle: Format, validate, and minify JSON with ease.

uuid.name: UUID Generator
uuid.desc: Generate UUID v1 and v4 in bulk
uuid.title: UUID Generator
uuid.subtitle: Generate UUID v4 in bulk. Click to copy.

password.name: Password Generator
password.desc: Generate strong passwords with custom configuration
password.title: Password Generator
password.subtitle: Generate strong passwords with custom configuration.
password.noAmbiguous: Avoid ambiguous characters (0, O, l, I)
password.minOneType: Choose at least one character type

timestamp.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.desc: Convert Unix timestamp to date or vice versa
timestamp.title: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.subtitle: Convert Unix timestamps to readable dates, or the other way around.

color.name: Color Converter
color.desc: Convert HEX, RGB, HSL, and other color formats
color.title: Color Converter
color.subtitle: Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, and other color formats.

text.name: Text Analyzer
text.desc: Count words, characters, and transform text case
text.title: Text Analyzer
text.subtitle: Count words, characters, lines, and transform text format easily.

qrcode.name: QR Code Generator
qrcode.desc: Create QR codes from text or URL
qrcode.title: QR Code Generator
qrcode.subtitle: Generate QR codes from any URL, text, or content.
